title: Review fixes: wave cap 7->6, conditionals on the review slot, precise synthesis rationale
action: Apply the three gated_auto review fixes: (1) wave cap 7 -> 6 at SKILL.md lane-table high-risk row ('cap 7'), SKILL.md conditional-reviewers paragraph ('cap the wave at 7'), and reviewing-reference.md rules ('Cap the wave at 7 reviewers total') — preserves max 2 conditional dispatches now that the pair's 2 slots are gone; (2) reviewing-reference.md conditional paragraph 'same generation tier' -> 'same review slot' (aligns with SKILL.md review-slot rule, decision 0021); (3) SKILL.md synthesis rationale: replace the 'strongest model in the wave' claim with the precise one — the old synthesis agent ran on the orchestrator's own model, so dispatching it added a hop, not a mind.

truths: No 'cap 7' / 'cap the wave at 7' / 'same generation tier' / 'strongest model' text remains in the two files
Cap reads 6 in both files; conditionals explicitly use the review slot
prohibitions: No other semantic change to the review protocol
No test, CI, lockfile, or verify-config changes

verify: ! grep -rn -i -F -e 'cap the wave at 7' -e 'cap 7' -e 'same generation tier' -e 'strongest model' skills/bee-reviewing/SKILL.md skills/bee-reviewing/references/reviewing-reference.md && grep -qF 'cap 6' skills/bee-reviewing/SKILL.md && grep -qiF 'cap the wave at 6' skills/bee-reviewing/references/reviewing-reference.md && grep -qF 'same review slot' skills/bee-reviewing/references/reviewing-reference.md && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs

trace.outcome: Three review fixes applied: wave cap 7->6 (3 sites, preserves max 2 conditional dispatches post-pair-removal), conditionals aligned to the review slot (fixes pre-existing 0021 drift in the reference), synthesis rationale reworded to the precise orchestrator's-own-model claim.
